## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Scope

- API / schema / test impact

## Checks

- [ ] OpenAPI / contract impact reviewed
- [ ] RBAC / auth impact reviewed if relevant

## Ops / Release Impact

- [ ] no migrations
- [ ] migration included and documented
- [ ] no env changes
- [ ] runbook/docs updated if operational behavior changed
